product: Block specific internet destinations in network policies (Public Preview) ​
tagline: June 23, 2026 You can now block internet destinations from serverless workloads through the network policies REST API.
what_it_does: June 23, 2026 You can now block internet destinations from serverless workloads through the network policies REST API. Blocked destinations are enforced regardless of the policy's network access mode.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 23, 2026 You
capabilities.desc: June 23, 2026 You can now block internet destinations from serverless workloads through the network policies REST API.

key_takeaway: June 23, 2026 You can now block internet destinations from serverless workloads through the network policies REST API.
